word: G4393 - προφέρω - prophérō - prof-er'-o - Bring forth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προφέρω

- Transliteration: Prophero

- Phonetic: prof-er'-o

- Definition:

1. to bring forth

- Origin: from G4253 and G5342

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G5342; to bear forward that is produce: - bring forth.
